=== Sources === {{Reflist}}
== References == * {{Cite book|和書 |title=古事記 |volume= |date=October 30, 2014 |publisher={{ill|Shinchosha|en|Shinchosha|WD=Q1184979|lt=Shinchosha}} |ref={{SfnRef|Nishinomiya|2014}} |author={{ill|Kazutami Nishinomiya|ja|西宮一民|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kazutami Nishinomiya|1=Kazutami Nishimiya|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11627607}} (Editor) |isbn=978-4-10-620801-0 |series={{ill|Shincho Japanese Classical Compendium|ja|新潮日本古典集成|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shincho Japanese Classical Compendium|1=Shincho Japanese Classical Compendium|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11503629}} (New Edition)}} == See Also == * {{ill|The 17 Generations of Deities|ja|十七世神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/The 17 Generations of Deities|qq=}} * {{ill|Yashimajinumi|en|Yashimajinumi|WD=Q55522907|lt=Yashimajinumi}} - The first of the 17 generations.
== External Links == * [https://kojiki.kokugakuin.ac.jp/shinmei/yashimamujinokami/ Yashimamujinokami – Kokugakuin University Classical Culture Project]
{{Japanese mythology}} {{Shinto Horizontal}} == Overview of the Generations == {{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|建速須佐之男命|simple|User:Immanuelle/Takehaya Susanoo no Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}} married {{ill|Kushinadahime|ja|櫛名田比売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kushinadahime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kushinadahime|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to クシナダヒメ}} (daughter of [[Ashinazuchi and Tenazuchi]]) and had {{ill|Yashimajinumi|en|Yashimajinumi|WD=Q55522907|lt=Yashimajinumi}}<ref name="auto">{{Cite web|title=Encyclopedia of Shinto - Home : Kami in Classic Texts : Yashimajinumi|url=http://eos.kokugakuin.ac.jp/modules/xwords/entry.php?entryID=181|website=eos.kokugakuin.ac.jp}}</ref>.
This god married {{ill|Konohanachiru-hime|en|Konohanachiru-hime|WD=Q48745675|lt=Konohanachiru-hime}}<ref name="auto" /> (daughter of {{ill|Ōyamatsumi|ja|大山津見神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ōyamatsumi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōyamatsumi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to オオヤマツミ}}) and had {{ill|Fuwanomochikunusunu Kami|ja|布波能母遅久奴須奴神|1=Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|1=Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|simple|User:Immanuelle/Fuwanomochikunusunu Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuwanomochikunusunu Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|qq=}}.

'''Yashimamujinokami''' (八島牟遅能神, {{smaller|Modern kana orthography:}} ヤシマムジ) is a deity appearing in {{ill|Japanese mythology|en|Japanese mythology|WD=Q814158|lt=Japanese mythology}}.
== Overview == Yashimamujinokami is a deity mentioned exclusively in the ''{{ill|Kojiki|en|Kojiki|WD=Q813031|lt=Kojiki}}'' and is regarded as the parent of {{ill|Tottori-no-Kami|lt=Tottori-no-Kami|lt=Tottorijin|ja|鳥取神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tottorijin|qq=}}.
The name "Yashima" means "many islands," while "Muji" denotes "noble person." "No" is interpreted as a case particle, giving the name the meaning of "Noble person of many islands."{{Sfn|Nishinomiya|2014|p=381}}
== Genealogy == [[File:Ohokuninushi family tree.png|right|thumb|250px|Genealogy of Ōkuninushi (as per the ''Kojiki''). Blue represents male deities, red represents female deities, and yellow represents deities of unknown gender.]]
Yashimamujinokami's daughter is Tottorijin, who bore {{ill|Torinarumi no Kami|ja|鳥鳴海神|1=Torinarumi-no-Kami|1=Torinarumi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Torinarumi no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Torinarumi-no-Kami|qq=}} with {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}.

{{infobox deity| member_of= {{ill|The 17 Generations of Deities|lt=The 17 Generations of Deities|lt=17 spirits of the world|simple|User:Immanuelle/17 spirits of the world|ja|十七世神|fr|User:Immanuelle/17 esprits du monde|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/17 spirits of the world|qq=}} | type = Shinto | children = | father = | consort = | mother = | Name = Yashimamujinokami | Predecessor = | Successor = | Divine Order = {{ill|Kunitsukami|ja|国津神|1=Kunitsukami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunitsukami|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunitsukami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天津神・国津神|comment=confirming this goes to Kunitsukami|1=Kunitsukami|2=zh|3=國神|4=fr|5=Kunitsukami|6=mni|7=ꯀꯨꯅꯤꯠꯁꯨꯀꯃꯤ}} | Full Name = 八島牟遅能神 (Yashimamujinokami) | Alternate Name= 八嶋牟遅能神 | Other Names = | Divine Rank = | Divine Role = God of the Land | Mausoleum = | Father = Unknown | Mother = | Relatives = | Consort = Unknown | Children = {{ill|Tottori-no-Kami|lt=Tottori-no-Kami|lt=Tottorijin|ja|鳥取神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tottorijin|qq=}} | Shrine = | Texts = {{ill|Kojiki|en|Kojiki|WD=Q813031|lt=Kojiki}} | gender= {{ill|male|WD=Q6581097}} | offspring= {{ill|Totori no kami|WD=Q48760952}} }}
'''Yashimamujinokami''' (八島牟遅能神, {{smaller|Modern kana orthography:}} ヤシマムジ) is a deity appearing in {{ill|Japanese mythology|en|Japanese mythology|WD=Q814158|lt=Japanese mythology}}.
== Overview == Yashimamujinokami is a deity mentioned exclusively in the ''{{ill|Kojiki|en|Kojiki|WD=Q813031|lt=Kojiki}}'' and is regarded as the parent of {{ill|Tottori-no-Kami|lt=Tottori-no-Kami|lt=Tottorijin|ja|鳥取神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tottorijin|qq=}}.
The name "Yashima" means "many islands," while "Muji" denotes "noble person." "No" is interpreted as a case particle, giving the name the meaning of "Noble person of many islands."{{Sfn|Nishinomiya|2014|p=381}}
== Genealogy == [[File:Ohokuninushi family tree.png|right|thumb|250px|Genealogy of Ōkuninushi (as per the ''Kojiki''). Blue represents male deities, red represents female deities, and yellow represents deities of unknown gender.]]
Yashimamujinokami's daughter is Tottorijin, who bore {{ill|Torinarumi no Kami|ja|鳥鳴海神|1=Torinarumi-no-Kami|1=Torinarumi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Torinarumi no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Torinarumi-no-Kami|qq=}} with {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}.

'''Yashimamujinokami''' (八島牟遅能神, {{smaller|Modern kana orthography:}} ヤシマムジ) is a deity appearing in {{ill|Japanese mythology|en|Japanese mythology|WD=Q814158|lt=Japanese mythology}}.
== Overview == Yashimamujinokami is a deity mentioned exclusively in the ''{{ill|Kojiki|en|Kojiki|WD=Q813031|lt=Kojiki}}'' and is regarded as the parent of {{ill|Tottori-no-Kami|lt=Tottori-no-Kami|lt=Tottorijin|ja|鳥取神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tottorijin|qq=}}.
The name "Yashima" means "many islands," while "Muji" denotes "noble person." "No" is interpreted as a case particle, giving the name the meaning of "Noble person of many islands."{{Sfn|Nishinomiya|2014|p=381}}
== Genealogy == [[File:Ohokuninushi family tree.png|right|thumb|250px|Genealogy of Ōkuninushi (as per the ''Kojiki''). Blue represents male deities, red represents female deities, and yellow represents deities of unknown gender.]]
Yashimamujinokami's daughter is Tottorijin, who bore {{ill|Torinarumi no Kami|ja|鳥鳴海神|1=Torinarumi-no-Kami|1=Torinarumi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Torinarumi no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Torinarumi-no-Kami|qq=}} with {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}.

{{infobox deity| member_of= {{ill|The 17 Generations of Deities|lt=The 17 Generations of Deities|lt=17 spirits of the world|simple|User:Immanuelle/17 spirits of the world|ja|十七世神|fr|User:Immanuelle/17 esprits du monde|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/17 spirits of the world|qq=}} | type = Shinto | children = | father = | consort = | mother = | Name = Yashimamujinokami | Predecessor = | Successor = | Divine Order = {{ill|Kunitsukami|ja|国津神|1=Kunitsukami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunitsukami|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunitsukami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天津神・国津神|comment=confirming this goes to Kunitsukami|1=Kunitsukami|2=zh|3=國神|4=fr|5=Kunitsukami|6=mni|7=ꯀꯨꯅꯤꯠꯁꯨꯀꯃꯤ}} | Full Name = 八島牟遅能神 (Yashimamujinokami) | Alternate Name= 八嶋牟遅能神 | Other Names = | Divine Rank = | Divine Role = God of the Land | Mausoleum = | Father = Unknown | Mother = | Relatives = | Consort = Unknown | Children = {{ill|Tottori-no-Kami|lt=Tottori-no-Kami|lt=Tottorijin|ja|鳥取神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tottorijin|qq=}} | Shrine = | Texts = {{ill|Kojiki|en|Kojiki|WD=Q813031|lt=Kojiki}} | gender= {{ill|male|WD=Q6581097}} | offspring= {{ill|Totori no kami|WD=Q48760952}} }}
'''Yashimamujinokami''' (八島牟遅能神, {{smaller|Modern kana orthography:}} ヤシマムジ) is a deity appearing in {{ill|Japanese mythology|en|Japanese mythology|WD=Q814158|lt=Japanese mythology}}.
== Overview == Yashimamujinokami is a deity mentioned exclusively in the ''{{ill|Kojiki|en|Kojiki|WD=Q813031|lt=Kojiki}}'' and is regarded as the parent of {{ill|Tottori-no-Kami|lt=Tottori-no-Kami|lt=Tottorijin|ja|鳥取神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tottorijin|qq=}}.
The name "Yashima" means "many islands," while "Muji" denotes "noble person." "No" is interpreted as a case particle, giving the name the meaning of "Noble person of many islands."{{Sfn|Nishinomiya|2014|p=381}}
== Genealogy == [[File:Ohokuninushi family tree.png|right|thumb|250px|Genealogy of Ōkuninushi (as per the ''Kojiki''). Blue represents male deities, red represents female deities, and yellow represents deities of unknown gender.]]
Yashimamujinokami's daughter is {{ill|Tottori-no-Kami|lt=Tottorijin|ja|鳥取神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tottorijin|qq=}}, who bore {{ill|Torinarumi no Kami|ja|鳥鳴海神|1=Torinarumi-no-Kami|1=Torinarumi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Torinarumi no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Torinarumi-no-Kami|qq=}} with {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}.

{{infobox deity| member_of= {{ill|The 17 Generations of Deities|lt=The 17 Generations of Deities|lt=17 spirits of the world|simple|User:Immanuelle/17 spirits of the world|ja|十七世神|fr|User:Immanuelle/17 esprits du monde|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/17 spirits of the world|qq=}} | type = Shinto | children = | father = | consort = | mother = | Name = Yashimamujinokami | Predecessor = | Successor = | Divine Order = {{ill|Kunitsukami|ja|国津神|1=Kunitsukami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunitsukami|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunitsukami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天津神・国津神|comment=confirming this goes to Kunitsukami|1=Kunitsukami|2=zh|3=國神|4=fr|5=Kunitsukami|6=mni|7=ꯀꯨꯅꯤꯠꯁꯨꯀꯃꯤ}} | Full Name = 八島牟遅能神 (Yashimamujinokami) | Alternate Name= 八嶋牟遅能神 | Other Names = | Divine Rank = | Divine Role = God of the Land | Mausoleum = | Father = Unknown | Mother = | Relatives = | Consort = Unknown | Children = {{ill|Tottori-no-Kami|lt=Tottori-no-Kami|lt=Tottorijin|ja|鳥取神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tottorijin|qq=}} | Shrine = | Texts = {{ill|Kojiki|en|Kojiki|WD=Q813031|lt=Kojiki}} | gender= {{ill|male|WD=Q6581097}} | offspring= {{ill|Totori no kami|WD=Q48760952}} }}
'''Yashimamujinokami''' (八島牟遅能神, {{smaller|Modern kana orthography:}} ヤシマムジ) is a deity appearing in {{ill|Japanese mythology|en|Japanese mythology|WD=Q814158|lt=Japanese mythology}}.
== Overview == Yashimamujinokami is a deity mentioned exclusively in the ''{{ill|Kojiki|en|Kojiki|WD=Q813031|lt=Kojiki}}'' and is regarded as the parent of {{ill|Tottori-no-Kami|lt=Tottori-no-Kami|lt=Tottorijin|ja|鳥取神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tottorijin|qq=}}.
The name "Yashima" means "many islands," while "Muji" denotes "noble person." "No" is interpreted as a case particle, giving the name the meaning of "Noble person of many islands."{{Sfn|Nishinomiya|2014|p=381}}
== Genealogy == [[File:Ohokuninushi family tree.png|right|thumb|250px|Genealogy of Ōkuninushi (as per the ''Kojiki''). Blue represents male deities, red represents female deities, and yellow represents deities of unknown gender.]]
Yashimamujinokami's daughter is {{ill|Tottori-no-Kami|lt=Tottorijin|ja|鳥取神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tottorijin|qq=}}, who bore {{ill|Torinarumi no Kami|ja|鳥鳴海神|1=Torinarumi-no-Kami|1=Torinarumi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Torinarumi no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Torinarumi-no-Kami|qq=}} with {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}.

{{infobox deity| member_of= {{ill|The 17 Generations of Deities|lt=The 17 Generations of Deities|lt=17 spirits of the world|simple|User:Immanuelle/17 spirits of the world|ja|十七世神|fr|User:Immanuelle/17 esprits du monde|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/17 spirits of the world|qq=}} | type = Shinto | children = | father = | consort = | mother = | Name = Yashimamujinokami | Predecessor = | Successor = | Divine Order = {{ill|Kunitsukami|ja|国津神|1=Kunitsukami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunitsukami|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunitsukami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天津神・国津神|comment=confirming this goes to Kunitsukami|1=Kunitsukami|2=zh|3=國神|4=fr|5=Kunitsukami|6=mni|7=ꯀꯨꯅꯤꯠꯁꯨꯀꯃꯤ}} | Full Name = 八島牟遅能神 (Yashimamujinokami) | Alternate Name= 八嶋牟遅能神 | Other Names = | Divine Rank = | Divine Role = God of the Land | Mausoleum = | Father = Unknown | Mother = | Relatives = | Consort = Unknown | Children = {{ill|Tottori-no-Kami|lt=Tottori-no-Kami|lt=Tottorijin|ja|鳥取神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tottorijin|qq=}} | Shrine = | Texts = {{ill|Kojiki|en|Kojiki|WD=Q813031|lt=Kojiki}} | gender= {{ill|male|WD=Q6581097}} | offspring= {{ill|Totori no kami|WD=Q48760952}} }}
'''Yashimamujinokami''' (八島牟遅能神, {{smaller|Modern kana orthography:}} ヤシマムジ) is a deity appearing in {{ill|Japanese mythology|en|Japanese mythology|WD=Q814158|lt=Japanese mythology}}.
== Overview == Yashimamujinokami is a deity mentioned exclusively in the ''{{ill|Kojiki|en|Kojiki|WD=Q813031|lt=Kojiki}}'' and is regarded as the parent of {{ill|Tottori-no-Kami|lt=Tottori-no-Kami|lt=Tottorijin|ja|鳥取神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tottorijin|qq=}}.
The name "Yashima" means "many islands," while "Muji" denotes "noble person." "No" is interpreted as a case particle, giving the name the meaning of "Noble person of many islands."{{Sfn|Nishinomiya|2014|p=381}}
== Genealogy == [[File:Ohokuninushi family tree.png|right|thumb|250px|Genealogy of Ōkuninushi (as per the ''Kojiki''). Blue represents male deities, red represents female deities, and yellow represents deities of unknown gender.]]
Yashimamujinokami's daughter is {{ill|Tottori-no-Kami|lt=Tottorijin|ja|鳥取神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tottorijin|qq=}}, who bore {{ill|Torinarumi no Kami|ja|鳥鳴海神|1=Torinarumi-no-Kami|1=Torinarumi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Torinarumi no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Torinarumi-no-Kami|qq=}} with {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}.

This god married {{ill|Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja|活玉前玉比売神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of {{ill|Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja|比比羅木之其花麻豆美神|1=Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) and had {{ill|Mironami-no-Kami|ja|美呂浪神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
This god married {{ill|Aonuma-Mashi-no-Maou-hime|ja|青沼馬沼押比売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Aonuma-Mashi-no-Maou-hime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aonuma-Mashi-no-Maou-hime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of {{ill|Shikiyamanushi-no-Kami|ja|敷山主神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Shikiyamanushi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikiyamanushi-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) and had {{ill|Nunototomi Torinarumi-no-Kami|ja|布忍富鳥鳴海神|1=Nunobutomi-Torinarumi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Nunototomi Torinarumi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nunototomi Torinarumi-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Nunobutomi-Torinarumi-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
This god married {{ill|Wakatsukime Kami|ja|若尽女神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Wakatsukime Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakatsukime Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and had {{ill|Amanohibarudaisakanodomi Kami|ja|天日腹大科度美神|1=Ame-no-Hibaraooshinadomi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Amanohibarudaisakanodomi Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amanohibarudaisakanodomi Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Hibaraooshinadomi-no-Kami|qq=}}.
This god married {{ill|Totsumatone-no-Kami|ja|遠津待根神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Totsumatone-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Totsumatone-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of {{ill|Amanosagiri-no-Kami|ja|天之狭霧神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Amanosagiri-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amanosagiri-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to オオヤマツミ}}) and had {{ill|Totsuyami-Sakitara-no-Kami|ja|遠津山岬多良斯神|1=Totsuyami-Sakitara-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Totsuyami-Sakitara-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Totsuyami-Sakitara-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Totsuyami-Sakitara-no-Kami|qq=}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八島牟遅能神]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八島牟遅能神]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八島牟遅能神]]
{{infobox deity| member_of= {{ill|The 17 Generations of Deities|lt=The 17 Generations of Deities|lt=Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|simple|User:Immanuelle/Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|ja|十七世神|fr|User:Immanuelle/17 esprits du monde|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|qq=}} | type = Shinto | children = | father = | consort = | mother = | Name = Yashimamujinokami | Predecessor = | Successor = | Divine Order = {{ill|Kunitsukami|ja|国津神|1=Kunitsukami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunitsukami|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunitsukami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天津神・国津神|comment=confirming this goes to Kunitsukami|1=Kunitsukami|2=zh|3=國神|4=fr|5=Kunitsukami|6=mni|7=ꯀꯨꯅꯤꯠꯁꯨꯀꯃꯤ}} | Full Name = 八島牟遅能神 (Yashimamujinokami) | Alternate Name= 八嶋牟遅能神 | Other Names = | Divine Rank = | Divine Role = God of the Land | Mausoleum = | Father = Unknown | Mother = | Relatives = | Consort = Unknown | Children = {{ill|Tottori-no-Kami|lt=Tottori-no-Kami|lt=Tottorijin|ja|鳥取神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tottorijin|qq=}} | Shrine = | Texts = {{ill|Kojiki|en|Kojiki|WD=Q813031|lt=Kojiki}} | gender= {{ill|male|WD=Q6581097}} | offspring= {{ill|Totori no kami|WD=Q48760952}} }}
'''Yashimamujinokami''' (八島牟遅能神, {{smaller|Modern kana orthography:}} ヤシマムジ) is a deity appearing in {{ill|Japanese mythology|en|Japanese mythology|WD=Q814158|lt=Japanese mythology}}.
== Overview == Yashimamujinokami is a deity mentioned exclusively in the ''{{ill|Kojiki|en|Kojiki|WD=Q813031|lt=Kojiki}}'' and is regarded as the parent of {{ill|Tottori-no-Kami|lt=Tottori-no-Kami|lt=Tottorijin|ja|鳥取神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tottorijin|qq=}}.
The name "Yashima" means "many islands," while "Muji" denotes "noble person." "No" is interpreted as a case particle, giving the name the meaning of "Noble person of many islands."{{Sfn|Nishinomiya|2014|p=381}}
== Genealogy == [[File:Ohokuninushi family tree.png|right|thumb|250px|Genealogy of Ōkuninushi (as per the ''Kojiki''). Blue represents male deities, red represents female deities, and yellow represents deities of unknown gender.]]
Yashimamujinokami's daughter is {{ill|Tottori-no-Kami|lt=Tottorijin|ja|鳥取神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tottorijin|qq=}}, who bore {{ill|Torinarumi no Kami|ja|鳥鳴海神|1=Torinarumi-no-Kami|1=Torinarumi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Torinarumi no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Torinarumi-no-Kami|qq=}} with {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}.
== See Also == * {{ill|The 17 Generations of Deities|ja|十七世神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/The 17 Generations of Deities|qq=}} * {{ill|Yashimajinumi|en|Yashimajinumi|WD=Q55522907|lt=Yashimajinumi}} - The first of the 17 generations.

{{Japanese mythology}} {{Shinto Horizontal}} == Overview of the Generations == {{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|建速須佐之男命|simple|User:Immanuelle/Takehaya Susanoo no Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}} married {{ill|Kushinadahime|ja|櫛名田比売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kushinadahime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kushinadahime|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to クシナダヒメ}} (daughter of [[Ashinazuchi and Tenazuchi]]) and had {{ill|Yashimajinumi|en|Yashimajinumi|WD=Q55522907|lt=Yashimajinumi}}<ref name="auto">{{Cite web|title=Encyclopedia of Shinto - Home : Kami in Classic Texts : Yashimajinumi|url=http://eos.kokugakuin.ac.jp/modules/xwords/entry.php?entryID=181|website=eos.kokugakuin.ac.jp}}</ref>.
This god married {{ill|Konohanachiru-hime|en|Konohanachiru-hime|WD=Q48745675|lt=Konohanachiru-hime}}<ref name="auto" /> (daughter of {{ill|Ōyamatsumi|ja|大山津見神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ōyamatsumi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōyamatsumi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to オオヤマツミ}}) and had {{ill|Fuwanomochikunusunu Kami|ja|布波能母遅久奴須奴神|1=Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|1=Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|simple|User:Immanuelle/Fuwanomochikunusunu Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuwanomochikunusunu Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|qq=}}.
This god married {{ill|Hikawahime|ja|日河比売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hikawahime|fr|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikawahime|qq=}} (daughter of {{ill|Kuraokami|en|Kuraokami|WD=Q644201|lt=Kuraokami}}) and had {{ill|Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|ja|深淵之水夜礼花神|1=Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|simple|User:Immanuelle/Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|qq=}}.
This god married {{ill|Amanotsutobetsuneru Kami|ja|天之都度閇知泥神|1=Ame-no-Tsudoechine|simple|User:Immanuelle/Amanotsutobetsuneru Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amanotsutobetsuneru Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Tsudoechine|qq=}} and had {{ill|Omizunu|en|Omizunu|WD=Q48745416|lt=Omizunu}}.
This god married {{ill|Futemimi|ja|布帝耳神|1=Futemimi|fr|6=simple|7=User:Immanuelle/Futemimi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Futemimi|13=User:Immanuelle/Futemimi|qq=}} (daughter of {{ill|Funodomuno Kami|ja|布怒豆怒神|1=Funozuno|simple|User:Immanuelle/Funodomuno Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Funodomuno Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Funozuno|qq=}}) and had {{ill|Ame-no-Fuyukinu|en|Ame-no-Fuyukinu|WD=Q48744862|lt=Ame-no-Fuyukinu}}<ref>Philippi, Donald L. (2015). ''Kojiki''. Princeton University Press. p. 92.</ref><ref>Chamberlain (1882). [http://sacred-texts.com/shi/kj/kj027.htm Section XX.—The August Ancestors of the Deity-Master-Of-The-Great Land.]</ref>. (daughter of {{ill|Ōyamatsumi|ja|大山津見神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ōyamatsumi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōyamatsumi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to オオヤマツミ}}) and had {{ill|Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|ja|布波能母遅久奴須奴神|1=Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|1=Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|qq=}}<ref>{{cite book|url=https://books.google.com/books?id=Sg_JBQAAQBAJ&pg=PT402|title=Shinto: At the Fountainhead of Japan|last=Herbert|first=J.|publisher=Taylor & Francis|year=2010|isbn=978-1-136-90376-2|series=Routledge Library Editions: Japan|page=402|access-date=2020-11-21}}</ref>.
This god married {{ill|Hikawahime|ja|日河比売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hikawahime|fr|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikawahime|qq=}} (daughter of {{ill|Kuraokami|en|Kuraokami|WD=Q644201|lt=Kuraokami}}) and had {{ill|Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|ja|深淵之水夜礼花神|1=Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|simple|User:Immanuelle/Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|qq=}}.
This god married {{ill|Ame-no-Tsudoechine|ja|天之都度閇知泥神|1=Ame-no-Tsudoechine|en|6=simple|7=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Tsudoechine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Tsudoechine|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Tsudoechine|qq=}} and had {{ill|Omizunu|en|Omizunu|WD=Q48745416|lt=Omizunu}}.
This god married {{ill|Futemimi|ja|布帝耳神|1=Futemimi|fr|6=simple|7=User:Immanuelle/Futemimi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Futemimi|13=User:Immanuelle/Futemimi|qq=}} (daughter of {{ill|Funozuno|ja|布怒豆怒神|1=Funozuno|simple|User:Immanuelle/Funozuno|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Funozuno|13=User:Immanuelle/Funozuno|qq=}}) and had {{ill|Ame-no-Fuyukinu|en|Ame-no-Fuyukinu|WD=Q48744862|lt=Ame-no-Fuyukinu}}<ref>Philippi, Donald L. (2015). ''Kojiki''. Princeton University Press. p. 92.</ref><ref>Chamberlain (1882). [http://sacred-texts.com/shi/kj/kj027.htm Section XX.—The August Ancestors of the Deity-Master-Of-The-Great Land.]</ref>. (This Amanofuyuorihime Kami is also known as Amanofukine Kami{{Sfn|Kondo Toshitaka|1993}}, and is said to be the child of Takehaya Susanoo no Mikoto {{ill|Hinomisaki Shrine|ja|日御崎神社社伝。|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinomisaki Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. The child {{ill|Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|ja|清武豊彦命|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135491392}} is the ancestor of the {{ill|Ono Family (Shake)|lt=Ono Family|ja|小野氏 (社家)|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ono Family (Shake)|lt=Ono Family|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Family (Shake)|qq=}} who were priests of {{ill|Hinomisaki Shrine|ja|日御崎神社社伝。|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinomisaki Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}{{Sfn|Kondo Toshitaka|1993}}.)
This god married {{ill|Sashikuni Wakahime|ja|刺国若比売|1=Sashikuni Wakahime|2=ja|3=刺国若比売|4=simple|5=User:Immanuelle/Sashikuni Wakahime|en:draft|simple|User:Immanuelle/Sashikuni Wakahime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sashikuni Wakahime|13=User:Immanuelle/Sashikuni Wakahime|qq=}} (daughter of {{ill|Sashikuni Ōkami|ja|刺国大神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Sashikuni Ōkami|fr|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sashikuni Ōkami|qq=}}) and had {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi no Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}} (Ōnamuchi no Kami. Half-sibling to the {{ill|Yasogami|ja|八十神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Yasogami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yasogami|qq=}}).
This god married {{ill|Tottori-no-Kami|ja|鳥取神|1=Tottori-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Tottori-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tottori-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Tottori-no-Kami|qq=}} (daughter of {{ill|Yashimamochinogami|ja|八島牟遅能神|1=Yashimamuji|simple|User:Immanuelle/Yashimamochinogami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yashimamochinogami|13=User:Immanuelle/Yashimamuji|qq=}}) and had {{ill|Torinarumi-no-Kami|ja|鳥鳴海神|1=Torinarumi-no-Kami|1=Torinarumi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Torinarumi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Torinarumi-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Torinarumi-no-Kami|qq=}}.
This god married {{ill|Hinateri-Nukada-Bichio-Ikochini-no-Kami|ja|日名照額田毘道男伊許知邇神|1=Hinateri-Nukada-Bichio-Ikochini-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hinateri-Nukada-Bichio-Ikochini-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinateri-Nukada-Bichio-Ikochini-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinateri-Nukada-Bichio-Ikochini-no-Kami|qq=}} and had {{ill|Kuninotoshimi-no-Kami|ja|国忍富神|1=Kuninotoshimi-no-Kami|1=Kuninotoshimi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kuninotoshimi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuninotoshimi-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuninotoshimi-no-Kami|qq=}}.
This god married {{ill|Ashinataka-no-Kami|ja|葦那陀迦神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ashinataka-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashinataka-no-Kami|qq=}} and had {{ill|Hayamike-no-Takekasayanosunumi-no-Kami|ja|速甕之多気佐波夜遅奴美神|1=Hayamike-no-Takekasayanosunumi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hayamike-no-Takekasayanosunumi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hayamike-no-Takekasayanosunumi-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Hayamike-no-Takekasayanosunumi-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
This god married {{ill|Sakitamahime|ja|前玉比売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Sakitamahime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakitamahime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of {{ill|Amanomikemunushi-no-Kami|ja|天之甕主神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Amanomikemunushi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amanomikemunushi-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) and had {{ill|Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja|甕主日子神|1=Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
This god married {{ill|Hinarashibime|ja|比那良志毘売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of {{ill|Kuraokami|en|Kuraokami|WD=Q644201|lt=Kuraokami}}) and had {{ill|Tahirikishimarumi Kami|ja|多比理岐志麻流美神|1=Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|10=zh|11=多比理岐志麻流美神|1=Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Tahirikishimarumi Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tahirikishimarumi Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|qq=}}.
This god married {{ill|Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja|活玉前玉比売神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of {{ill|Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja|比比羅木之其花麻豆美神|1=Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) and had {{ill|Mironami-no-Kami|ja|美呂浪神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
This god married {{ill|Aonuma-Mashi-no-Maou-hime|ja|青沼馬沼押比売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Aonuma-Mashi-no-Maou-hime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aonuma-Mashi-no-Maou-hime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of {{ill|Shikiyamanushi-no-Kami|ja|敷山主神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Shikiyamanushi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikiyamanushi-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) and had {{ill|Nunototomi Torinarumi-no-Kami|ja|布忍富鳥鳴海神|1=Nunobutomi-Torinarumi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Nunototomi Torinarumi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nunototomi Torinarumi-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Nunobutomi-Torinarumi-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
This god married {{ill|Wakatsukime Kami|ja|若尽女神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Wakatsukime Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakatsukime Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and had {{ill|Amanohibarudaisakanodomi Kami|ja|天日腹大科度美神|1=Ame-no-Hibaraooshinadomi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Amanohibarudaisakanodomi Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amanohibarudaisakanodomi Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Hibaraooshinadomi-no-Kami|qq=}}.
This god married {{ill|Totsumatone-no-Kami|ja|遠津待根神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Totsumatone-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Totsumatone-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of {{ill|Amanosagiri-no-Kami|ja|天之狭霧神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Amanosagiri-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amanosagiri-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to オオヤマツミ}}) and had {{ill|Totsuyami-Sakitara-no-Kami|ja|遠津山岬多良斯神|1=Totsuyami-Sakitara-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Totsuyami-Sakitara-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Totsuyami-Sakitara-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Totsuyami-Sakitara-no-Kami|qq=}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八島牟遅能神]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八島牟遅能神]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八島牟遅能神]]
{{infobox deity| member_of= {{ill|Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|lt=Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|lt=Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|simple|User:Immanuelle/Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|ja|十七世神|fr|User:Immanuelle/17 esprits du monde|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|qq=}} | type = Shinto | children = | father = | consort = | mother = | Name = Yashimamujinokami | Predecessor = | Successor = | Divine Order = {{ill|Kunitsukami|ja|国津神|1=Kunitsukami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunitsukami|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunitsukami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天津神・国津神|comment=confirming this goes to Kunitsukami|1=Kunitsukami|2=zh|3=國神|4=fr|5=Kunitsukami|6=mni|7=ꯀꯨꯅꯤꯠꯁꯨꯀꯃꯤ}} | Full Name = 八島牟遅能神 (Yashimamujinokami) | Alternate Name= 八嶋牟遅能神 | Other Names = | Divine Rank = | Divine Role = God of the Land | Mausoleum = | Father = Unknown | Mother = | Relatives = | Consort = Unknown | Children = {{ill|Tottori-no-Kami|lt=Tottori-no-Kami|lt=Tottorijin|ja|鳥取神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tottorijin|qq=}} | Shrine = | Texts = {{ill|Kojiki|en|Kojiki|WD=Q813031|lt=Kojiki}} | gender= {{ill|male|WD=Q6581097}} | offspring= {{ill|Totori no kami|WD=Q48760952}} }}
'''Yashimamujinokami''' (八島牟遅能神, {{smaller|Modern kana orthography:}} ヤシマムジ) is a deity appearing in {{ill|Japanese mythology|en|Japanese mythology|WD=Q814158|lt=Japanese mythology}}.
== Overview == Yashimamujinokami is a deity mentioned exclusively in the ''{{ill|Kojiki|en|Kojiki|WD=Q813031|lt=Kojiki}}'' and is regarded as the parent of {{ill|Tottori-no-Kami|lt=Tottori-no-Kami|lt=Tottorijin|ja|鳥取神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tottorijin|qq=}}.
The name "Yashima" means "many islands," while "Muji" denotes "noble person." "No" is interpreted as a case particle, giving the name the meaning of "Noble person of many islands."{{Sfn|Nishinomiya|2014|p=381}}
== Genealogy == [[File:Ohokuninushi family tree.png|right|thumb|250px|Genealogy of Ōkuninushi (as per the ''Kojiki''). Blue represents male deities, red represents female deities, and yellow represents deities of unknown gender.]]
Yashimamujinokami's daughter is {{ill|Tottori-no-Kami|lt=Tottorijin|ja|鳥取神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tottorijin|qq=}}, who bore {{ill|Torinarumi no Kami|ja|鳥鳴海神|1=Torinarumi-no-Kami|1=Torinarumi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Torinarumi no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Torinarumi-no-Kami|qq=}} with {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}.
== See Also == * {{ill|Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|ja|十七世神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|qq=}} * {{ill|Yashimajinumi|en|Yashimajinumi|WD=Q55522907|lt=Yashimajinumi}} - The first of the 17 generations.

== External Links == * [https://kojiki.kokugakuin.ac.jp/shinmei/yashimamujinokami/ Yashimamujinokami – Kokugakuin University Classical Culture Project]
{{Japanese mythology}} {{Shinto Horizontal}} == Overview of the Generations == {{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|建速須佐之男命|simple|User:Immanuelle/Takehaya Susanoo no Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}} married {{ill|Kushinadahime|ja|櫛名田比売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kushinadahime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kushinadahime|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to クシナダヒメ}} (daughter of [[Ashinazuchi and Tenazuchi]]) and had {{ill|Yashimajinumi|en|Yashimajinumi|WD=Q55522907|lt=Yashimajinumi}}<ref name="auto">{{Cite web|title=Encyclopedia of Shinto - Home : Kami in Classic Texts : Yashimajinumi|url=http://eos.kokugakuin.ac.jp/modules/xwords/entry.php?entryID=181|website=eos.kokugakuin.ac.jp}}</ref>.
This god married {{ill|Konohanachiru-hime|en|Konohanachiru-hime|WD=Q48745675|lt=Konohanachiru-hime}}<ref name="auto" /> (daughter of {{ill|Ōyamatsumi|ja|大山津見神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ōyamatsumi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōyamatsumi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to オオヤマツミ}}) and had {{ill|Fuwanomochikunusunu Kami|ja|布波能母遅久奴須奴神|1=Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|1=Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|simple|User:Immanuelle/Fuwanomochikunusunu Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuwanomochikunusunu Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|qq=}}.
This god married {{ill|Hikawahime|ja|日河比売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hikawahime|fr|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikawahime|qq=}} (daughter of {{ill|Kuraokami|en|Kuraokami|WD=Q644201|lt=Kuraokami}}) and had {{ill|Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|ja|深淵之水夜礼花神|1=Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|simple|User:Immanuelle/Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|qq=}}.
This god married {{ill|Amanotsutobetsuneru Kami|ja|天之都度閇知泥神|1=Ame-no-Tsudoechine|simple|User:Immanuelle/Amanotsutobetsuneru Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amanotsutobetsuneru Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Tsudoechine|qq=}} and had {{ill|Omizunu|en|Omizunu|WD=Q48745416|lt=Omizunu}}.
This god married {{ill|Futemimi|ja|布帝耳神|1=Futemimi|fr|6=simple|7=User:Immanuelle/Futemimi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Futemimi|13=User:Immanuelle/Futemimi|qq=}} (daughter of {{ill|Funodomuno Kami|ja|布怒豆怒神|1=Funozuno|simple|User:Immanuelle/Funodomuno Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Funodomuno Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Funozuno|qq=}}) and had {{ill|Ame-no-Fuyukinu|en|Ame-no-Fuyukinu|WD=Q48744862|lt=Ame-no-Fuyukinu}}<ref>Philippi, Donald L. (2015). ''Kojiki''. Princeton University Press. p. 92.</ref><ref>Chamberlain (1882). [http://sacred-texts.com/shi/kj/kj027.htm Section XX.—The August Ancestors of the Deity-Master-Of-The-Great Land.]</ref>. (daughter of {{ill|Ōyamatsumi|ja|大山津見神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ōyamatsumi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōyamatsumi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to オオヤマツミ}}) and had {{ill|Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|ja|布波能母遅久奴須奴神|1=Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|1=Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|qq=}}<ref>{{cite book|url=https://books.google.com/books?id=Sg_JBQAAQBAJ&pg=PT402|title=Shinto: At the Fountainhead of Japan|last=Herbert|first=J.|publisher=Taylor & Francis|year=2010|isbn=978-1-136-90376-2|series=Routledge Library Editions: Japan|page=402|access-date=2020-11-21}}</ref>.
This god married {{ill|Hikawahime|ja|日河比売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hikawahime|fr|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikawahime|qq=}} (daughter of {{ill|Kuraokami|en|Kuraokami|WD=Q644201|lt=Kuraokami}}) and had {{ill|Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|ja|深淵之水夜礼花神|1=Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|simple|User:Immanuelle/Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|qq=}}.
This god married {{ill|Ame-no-Tsudoechine|ja|天之都度閇知泥神|1=Ame-no-Tsudoechine|en|6=simple|7=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Tsudoechine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Tsudoechine|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Tsudoechine|qq=}} and had {{ill|Omizunu|en|Omizunu|WD=Q48745416|lt=Omizunu}}.
This god married {{ill|Futemimi|ja|布帝耳神|1=Futemimi|fr|6=simple|7=User:Immanuelle/Futemimi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Futemimi|13=User:Immanuelle/Futemimi|qq=}} (daughter of {{ill|Funozuno|ja|布怒豆怒神|1=Funozuno|simple|User:Immanuelle/Funozuno|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Funozuno|13=User:Immanuelle/Funozuno|qq=}}) and had {{ill|Ame-no-Fuyukinu|en|Ame-no-Fuyukinu|WD=Q48744862|lt=Ame-no-Fuyukinu}}<ref>Philippi, Donald L. (2015). ''Kojiki''. Princeton University Press. p. 92.</ref><ref>Chamberlain (1882). [http://sacred-texts.com/shi/kj/kj027.htm Section XX.—The August Ancestors of the Deity-Master-Of-The-Great Land.]</ref>. (This Amanofuyuorihime Kami is also known as Amanofukine Kami{{Sfn|Kondo Toshitaka|1993}}, and is said to be the child of Takehaya Susanoo no Mikoto {{ill|Hinomisaki Shrine|ja|日御崎神社社伝。|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinomisaki Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. The child {{ill|Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|ja|清武豊彦命|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135491392}} is the ancestor of the {{ill|Ono Family (Shake)|lt=Ono Family|ja|小野氏 (社家)|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ono Family (Shake)|lt=Ono Family|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Family (Shake)|qq=}} who were priests of {{ill|Hinomisaki Shrine|ja|日御崎神社社伝。|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinomisaki Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}{{Sfn|Kondo Toshitaka|1993}}.)
This god married {{ill|Sashikuni Wakahime|ja|刺国若比売|1=Sashikuni Wakahime|2=ja|3=刺国若比売|4=simple|5=User:Immanuelle/Sashikuni Wakahime|en:draft|simple|User:Immanuelle/Sashikuni Wakahime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sashikuni Wakahime|13=User:Immanuelle/Sashikuni Wakahime|qq=}} (daughter of {{ill|Sashikuni Ōkami|ja|刺国大神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Sashikuni Ōkami|fr|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sashikuni Ōkami|qq=}}) and had {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi no Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}} (Ōnamuchi no Kami. Half-sibling to the {{ill|Yasogami|ja|八十神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Yasogami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yasogami|qq=}}).
This god married {{ill|Tottori-no-Kami|ja|鳥取神|1=Tottori-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Tottori-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tottori-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Tottori-no-Kami|qq=}} (daughter of {{ill|Yashimamochinogami|ja|八島牟遅能神|1=Yashimamuji|simple|User:Immanuelle/Yashimamochinogami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yashimamochinogami|13=User:Immanuelle/Yashimamuji|qq=}}) and had {{ill|Torinarumi-no-Kami|ja|鳥鳴海神|1=Torinarumi-no-Kami|1=Torinarumi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Torinarumi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Torinarumi-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Torinarumi-no-Kami|qq=}}.
This god married {{ill|Hinateri-Nukada-Bichio-Ikochini-no-Kami|ja|日名照額田毘道男伊許知邇神|1=Hinateri-Nukada-Bichio-Ikochini-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hinateri-Nukada-Bichio-Ikochini-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinateri-Nukada-Bichio-Ikochini-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinateri-Nukada-Bichio-Ikochini-no-Kami|qq=}} and had {{ill|Kuninotoshimi-no-Kami|ja|国忍富神|1=Kuninotoshimi-no-Kami|1=Kuninotoshimi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kuninotoshimi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuninotoshimi-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuninotoshimi-no-Kami|qq=}}.
This god married {{ill|Ashinataka-no-Kami|ja|葦那陀迦神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ashinataka-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashinataka-no-Kami|qq=}} and had {{ill|Hayamike-no-Takekasayanosunumi-no-Kami|ja|速甕之多気佐波夜遅奴美神|1=Hayamike-no-Takekasayanosunumi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hayamike-no-Takekasayanosunumi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hayamike-no-Takekasayanosunumi-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Hayamike-no-Takekasayanosunumi-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
This god married {{ill|Sakitamahime|ja|前玉比売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Sakitamahime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakitamahime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of {{ill|Amanomikemunushi-no-Kami|ja|天之甕主神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Amanomikemunushi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amanomikemunushi-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) and had {{ill|Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja|甕主日子神|1=Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
This god married {{ill|Hinarashibime|ja|比那良志毘売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of {{ill|Kuraokami|en|Kuraokami|WD=Q644201|lt=Kuraokami}}) and had {{ill|Tahirikishimarumi Kami|ja|多比理岐志麻流美神|1=Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|10=zh|11=多比理岐志麻流美神|1=Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Tahirikishimarumi Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tahirikishimarumi Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|qq=}}.
This god married {{ill|Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja|活玉前玉比売神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of {{ill|Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja|比比羅木之其花麻豆美神|1=Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) and had {{ill|Mironami-no-Kami|ja|美呂浪神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
This god married {{ill|Aonuma-Mashi-no-Maou-hime|ja|青沼馬沼押比売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Aonuma-Mashi-no-Maou-hime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aonuma-Mashi-no-Maou-hime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of {{ill|Shikiyamanushi-no-Kami|ja|敷山主神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Shikiyamanushi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikiyamanushi-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) and had {{ill|Nunototomi Torinarumi-no-Kami|ja|布忍富鳥鳴海神|1=Nunobutomi-Torinarumi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Nunototomi Torinarumi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nunototomi Torinarumi-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Nunobutomi-Torinarumi-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
This god married {{ill|Wakatsukime Kami|ja|若尽女神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Wakatsukime Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakatsukime Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and had {{ill|Amanohibarudaisakanodomi Kami|ja|天日腹大科度美神|1=Ame-no-Hibaraooshinadomi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Amanohibarudaisakanodomi Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amanohibarudaisakanodomi Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Hibaraooshinadomi-no-Kami|qq=}}.
This god married {{ill|Totsumatone-no-Kami|ja|遠津待根神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Totsumatone-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Totsumatone-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of {{ill|Amanosagiri-no-Kami|ja|天之狭霧神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Amanosagiri-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amanosagiri-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to オオヤマツミ}}) and had {{ill|Totsuyami-Sakitara-no-Kami|ja|遠津山岬多良斯神|1=Totsuyami-Sakitara-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Totsuyami-Sakitara-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Totsuyami-Sakitara-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Totsuyami-Sakitara-no-Kami|qq=}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八島牟遅能神]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八島牟遅能神]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八島牟遅能神]]
{{infobox deity| member_of= {{ill|Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|lt=Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|lt=Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|simple|User:Immanuelle/Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|ja|十七世神|fr|User:Immanuelle/17 esprits du monde|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|qq=}} | type = Shinto | children = | father = | consort = | mother = | Name = Yashimamujinokami | Predecessor = | Successor = | Divine Order = {{ill|Kunitsukami|ja|国津神|1=Kunitsukami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunitsukami|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunitsukami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天津神・国津神|comment=confirming this goes to Kunitsukami|1=Kunitsukami|2=zh|3=國神|4=fr|5=Kunitsukami|6=mni|7=ꯀꯨꯅꯤꯠꯁꯨꯀꯃꯤ}} | Full Name = 八島牟遅能神 (Yashimamujinokami) | Alternate Name= 八嶋牟遅能神 | Other Names = | Divine Rank = | Divine Role = God of the Land | Mausoleum = | Father = Unknown | Mother = | Relatives = | Consort = Unknown | Children = {{ill|Tottori-no-Kami|lt=Tottori-no-Kami|lt=Tottorijin|ja|鳥取神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tottorijin|qq=}} | Shrine = | Texts = {{ill|Kojiki|en|Kojiki|WD=Q813031|lt=Kojiki|1=Kojiki}} | gender= {{ill|male|WD=Q6581097|1=Male (gender)}} | offspring= {{ill|Totori no kami|WD=Q48760952|1=Tottori-no-Kami}} }}
'''Yashimamujinokami''' (八島牟遅能神, {{smaller|Modern kana orthography:}} ヤシマムジ) is a deity appearing in {{ill|Japanese mythology|en|Japanese mythology|WD=Q814158|lt=Japanese mythology|1=Japanese mythology}}.
== Overview == Yashimamujinokami is a deity mentioned exclusively in the ''{{ill|Kojiki|en|Kojiki|WD=Q813031|lt=Kojiki|1=Kojiki}}'' and is regarded as the parent of {{ill|Tottori-no-Kami|lt=Tottori-no-Kami|lt=Tottorijin|ja|鳥取神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tottorijin|qq=}}.
The name "Yashima" means "many islands," while "Muji" denotes "noble person." "No" is interpreted as a case particle, giving the name the meaning of "Noble person of many islands."{{Sfn|Nishinomiya|2014|p=381}}
== Genealogy == [[File:Ohokuninushi family tree.png|right|thumb|250px|Genealogy of Ōkuninushi (as per the ''Kojiki''). Blue represents male deities, red represents female deities, and yellow represents deities of unknown gender.]]
Yashimamujinokami's daughter is {{ill|Tottori-no-Kami|lt=Tottorijin|ja|鳥取神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tottorijin|qq=}}, who bore {{ill|Torinarumi no Kami|ja|鳥鳴海神|1=Torinarumi-no-Kami|1=Torinarumi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Torinarumi no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Torinarumi-no-Kami|qq=}} with {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}.
== See Also == * {{ill|Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|ja|十七世神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|qq=}} * {{ill|Yashimajinumi|en|Yashimajinumi|WD=Q55522907|lt=Yashimajinumi|1=Yashimajinumi}} - The first of the 17 generations.

== External Links == * [https://kojiki.kokugakuin.ac.jp/shinmei/yashimamujinokami/ Yashimamujinokami – Kokugakuin University Classical Culture Project]
{{Japanese mythology}} {{Shinto Horizontal}} == Overview of the Generations == {{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|建速須佐之男命|simple|User:Immanuelle/Takehaya Susanoo no Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}} married {{ill|Kushinadahime|ja|櫛名田比売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kushinadahime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kushinadahime|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to クシナダヒメ}} (daughter of [[Ashinazuchi and Tenazuchi]]) and had {{ill|Yashimajinumi|en|Yashimajinumi|WD=Q55522907|lt=Yashimajinumi|1=Yashimajinumi}}<ref name="auto">{{Cite web|title=Encyclopedia of Shinto - Home : Kami in Classic Texts : Yashimajinumi|url=http://eos.kokugakuin.ac.jp/modules/xwords/entry.php?entryID=181|website=eos.kokugakuin.ac.jp}}</ref>.
This god married {{ill|Konohanachiru-hime|en|Konohanachiru-hime|WD=Q48745675|lt=Konohanachiru-hime|1=Konohanachiru-hime}}<ref name="auto" /> (daughter of {{ill|Ōyamatsumi|ja|大山津見神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ōyamatsumi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōyamatsumi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to オオヤマツミ}}) and had {{ill|Fuwanomochikunusunu Kami|ja|布波能母遅久奴須奴神|1=Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|1=Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|simple|User:Immanuelle/Fuwanomochikunusunu Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuwanomochikunusunu Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|qq=}}.
This god married {{ill|Hikawahime|ja|日河比売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hikawahime|fr|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikawahime|qq=}} (daughter of {{ill|Kuraokami|en|Kuraokami|WD=Q644201|lt=Kuraokami|1=Kuraokami}}) and had {{ill|Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|ja|深淵之水夜礼花神|1=Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|simple|User:Immanuelle/Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|qq=}}.
This god married {{ill|Amanotsutobetsuneru Kami|ja|天之都度閇知泥神|1=Ame-no-Tsudoechine|simple|User:Immanuelle/Amanotsutobetsuneru Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amanotsutobetsuneru Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Tsudoechine|qq=}} and had {{ill|Omizunu|en|Omizunu|WD=Q48745416|lt=Omizunu|1=Omizunu}}.
This god married {{ill|Futemimi|ja|布帝耳神|1=Futemimi|fr|6=simple|7=User:Immanuelle/Futemimi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Futemimi|13=User:Immanuelle/Futemimi|qq=}} (daughter of {{ill|Funodomuno Kami|ja|布怒豆怒神|1=Funozuno|simple|User:Immanuelle/Funodomuno Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Funodomuno Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Funozuno|qq=}}) and had {{ill|Ame-no-Fuyukinu|en|Ame-no-Fuyukinu|WD=Q48744862|lt=Ame-no-Fuyukinu|1=Ame-no-Fuyukinu}}<ref>Philippi, Donald L. (2015). ''Kojiki''. Princeton University Press. p. 92.</ref><ref>Chamberlain (1882). [http://sacred-texts.com/shi/kj/kj027.htm Section XX.—The August Ancestors of the Deity-Master-Of-The-Great Land.]</ref>. (daughter of {{ill|Ōyamatsumi|ja|大山津見神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ōyamatsumi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōyamatsumi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to オオヤマツミ}}) and had {{ill|Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|ja|布波能母遅久奴須奴神|1=Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|1=Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|qq=}}<ref>{{cite book|url=https://books.google.com/books?id=Sg_JBQAAQBAJ&pg=PT402|title=Shinto: At the Fountainhead of Japan|last=Herbert|first=J.|publisher=Taylor & Francis|year=2010|isbn=978-1-136-90376-2|series=Routledge Library Editions: Japan|page=402|access-date=2020-11-21}}</ref>.
This god married {{ill|Hikawahime|ja|日河比売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hikawahime|fr|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikawahime|qq=}} (daughter of {{ill|Kuraokami|en|Kuraokami|WD=Q644201|lt=Kuraokami|1=Kuraokami}}) and had {{ill|Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|ja|深淵之水夜礼花神|1=Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|simple|User:Immanuelle/Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|qq=}}.
This god married {{ill|Ame-no-Tsudoechine|ja|天之都度閇知泥神|1=Ame-no-Tsudoechine|en|6=simple|7=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Tsudoechine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Tsudoechine|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Tsudoechine|qq=}} and had {{ill|Omizunu|en|Omizunu|WD=Q48745416|lt=Omizunu|1=Omizunu}}.
This god married {{ill|Futemimi|ja|布帝耳神|1=Futemimi|fr|6=simple|7=User:Immanuelle/Futemimi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Futemimi|13=User:Immanuelle/Futemimi|qq=}} (daughter of {{ill|Funozuno|ja|布怒豆怒神|1=Funozuno|simple|User:Immanuelle/Funozuno|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Funozuno|13=User:Immanuelle/Funozuno|qq=}}) and had {{ill|Ame-no-Fuyukinu|en|Ame-no-Fuyukinu|WD=Q48744862|lt=Ame-no-Fuyukinu|1=Ame-no-Fuyukinu}}<ref>Philippi, Donald L. (2015). ''Kojiki''. Princeton University Press. p. 92.</ref><ref>Chamberlain (1882). [http://sacred-texts.com/shi/kj/kj027.htm Section XX.—The August Ancestors of the Deity-Master-Of-The-Great Land.]</ref>. (This Amanofuyuorihime Kami is also known as Amanofukine Kami{{Sfn|Kondo Toshitaka|1993}}, and is said to be the child of Takehaya Susanoo no Mikoto {{ill|Hinomisaki Shrine|ja|日御崎神社社伝。|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinomisaki Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. The child {{ill|Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|ja|清武豊彦命|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135491392|1=Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto}} is the ancestor of the {{ill|Ono Family (Shake)|lt=Ono Family|ja|小野氏 (社家)|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ono Family (Shake)|lt=Ono Family|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Family (Shake)|qq=}} who were priests of {{ill|Hinomisaki Shrine|ja|日御崎神社社伝。|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinomisaki Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}{{Sfn|Kondo Toshitaka|1993}}.)
This god married {{ill|Sashikuni Wakahime|ja|刺国若比売|1=Sashikuni Wakahime|2=ja|3=刺国若比売|4=simple|5=User:Immanuelle/Sashikuni Wakahime|en:draft|simple|User:Immanuelle/Sashikuni Wakahime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sashikuni Wakahime|13=User:Immanuelle/Sashikuni Wakahime|qq=}} (daughter of {{ill|Sashikuni Ōkami|ja|刺国大神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Sashikuni Ōkami|fr|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sashikuni Ōkami|qq=}}) and had {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi no Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}} (Ōnamuchi no Kami. Half-sibling to the {{ill|Yasogami|ja|八十神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Yasogami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yasogami|qq=}}).
This god married {{ill|Tottori-no-Kami|ja|鳥取神|1=Tottori-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Tottori-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tottori-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Tottori-no-Kami|qq=}} (daughter of {{ill|Yashimamochinogami|ja|八島牟遅能神|1=Yashimamuji|simple|User:Immanuelle/Yashimamochinogami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yashimamochinogami|13=User:Immanuelle/Yashimamuji|qq=}}) and had {{ill|Torinarumi-no-Kami|ja|鳥鳴海神|1=Torinarumi-no-Kami|1=Torinarumi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Torinarumi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Torinarumi-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Torinarumi-no-Kami|qq=}}.
This god married {{ill|Hinateri-Nukada-Bichio-Ikochini-no-Kami|ja|日名照額田毘道男伊許知邇神|1=Hinateri-Nukada-Bichio-Ikochini-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hinateri-Nukada-Bichio-Ikochini-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinateri-Nukada-Bichio-Ikochini-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinateri-Nukada-Bichio-Ikochini-no-Kami|qq=}} and had {{ill|Kuninotoshimi-no-Kami|ja|国忍富神|1=Kuninotoshimi-no-Kami|1=Kuninotoshimi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kuninotoshimi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuninotoshimi-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuninotoshimi-no-Kami|qq=}}.
This god married {{ill|Ashinataka-no-Kami|ja|葦那陀迦神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ashinataka-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashinataka-no-Kami|qq=}} and had {{ill|Hayamike-no-Takekasayanosunumi-no-Kami|ja|速甕之多気佐波夜遅奴美神|1=Hayamike-no-Takekasayanosunumi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hayamike-no-Takekasayanosunumi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hayamike-no-Takekasayanosunumi-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Hayamike-no-Takekasayanosunumi-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
This god married {{ill|Sakitamahime|ja|前玉比売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Sakitamahime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakitamahime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of {{ill|Amanomikemunushi-no-Kami|ja|天之甕主神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Amanomikemunushi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amanomikemunushi-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) and had {{ill|Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja|甕主日子神|1=Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
This god married {{ill|Hinarashibime|ja|比那良志毘売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of {{ill|Kuraokami|en|Kuraokami|WD=Q644201|lt=Kuraokami|1=Kuraokami}}) and had {{ill|Tahirikishimarumi Kami|ja|多比理岐志麻流美神|1=Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|10=zh|11=多比理岐志麻流美神|1=Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Tahirikishimarumi Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tahirikishimarumi Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|qq=}}.
This god married {{ill|Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja|活玉前玉比売神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of {{ill|Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja|比比羅木之其花麻豆美神|1=Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) and had {{ill|Mironami-no-Kami|ja|美呂浪神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

{{infobox deity| member_of= {{ill|Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|lt=Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|lt=Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|simple|User:Immanuelle/Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|ja|十七世神|fr|User:Immanuelle/17 esprits du monde|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|qq=}} | type = Shinto | children = | father = | consort = | mother = | Name = Yashimamujinokami | Predecessor = | Successor = | Divine Order = {{ill|Kunitsukami|ja|国津神|1=Kunitsukami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunitsukami|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunitsukami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天津神・国津神|comment=confirming this goes to Kunitsukami|1=Kunitsukami|2=zh|3=國神|4=fr|5=Kunitsukami|6=mni|7=ꯀꯨꯅꯤꯠꯁꯨꯀꯃꯤ}} | Full Name = 八島牟遅能神 (Yashimamujinokami) | Alternate Name= 八嶋牟遅能神 | Other Names = | Divine Rank = | Divine Role = God of the Land | Mausoleum = | Father = Unknown | Mother = | Relatives = | Consort = Unknown | Children = {{ill|Tottori-no-Kami|lt=Tottori-no-Kami|lt=Tottorijin|ja|鳥取神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tottorijin|qq=}} | Shrine = | Texts = {{ill|Kojiki|en|Kojiki|WD=Q813031|lt=Kojiki|1=Kojiki}} | gender= {{ill|male|WD=Q6581097|1=Male (gender)}} | offspring= {{ill|Totori no kami|WD=Q48760952|1=Tottori-no-Kami}} }}
'''Yashimamujinokami''' (八島牟遅能神, {{smaller|Modern kana orthography:}} ヤシマムジ) is a deity appearing in {{ill|Japanese mythology|en|Japanese mythology|WD=Q814158|lt=Japanese mythology|1=Japanese mythology}}.
== Overview == Yashimamujinokami is a deity mentioned exclusively in the ''{{ill|Kojiki|en|Kojiki|WD=Q813031|lt=Kojiki|1=Kojiki}}'' and is regarded as the parent of {{ill|Tottori-no-Kami|lt=Tottori-no-Kami|lt=Tottorijin|ja|鳥取神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tottorijin|qq=}}.
The name "Yashima" means "many islands," while "Muji" denotes "noble person." "No" is interpreted as a case particle, giving the name the meaning of "Noble person of many islands."{{Sfn|Nishinomiya|2014|p=381}}
== Genealogy == [[File:Ohokuninushi family tree.png|right|thumb|250px|Genealogy of Ōkuninushi (as per the ''Kojiki''). Blue represents male deities, red represents female deities, and yellow represents deities of unknown gender.]]
Yashimamujinokami's daughter is {{ill|Tottori-no-Kami|lt=Tottorijin|ja|鳥取神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tottorijin|qq=}}, who bore {{ill|Torinarumi no Kami|ja|鳥鳴海神|1=Torinarumi-no-Kami|1=Torinarumi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Torinarumi no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Torinarumi-no-Kami|qq=}} with {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}.

{{infobox deity| member_of= {{ill|Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|lt=Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|lt=Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|simple|User:Immanuelle/Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|ja|十七世神|fr|User:Immanuelle/17 esprits du monde|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|qq=}} | type = Shinto | children = | father = | consort = | mother = | Name = Yashimamujinokami | Predecessor = | Successor = | Divine Order = {{ill|Kunitsukami|ja|国津神|1=Kunitsukami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunitsukami|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunitsukami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天津神・国津神|comment=confirming this goes to Kunitsukami|1=Kunitsukami|2=zh|3=國神|4=fr|5=Kunitsukami|6=mni|7=ꯀꯨꯅꯤꯠꯁꯨꯀꯃꯤ}} | Full Name = 八島牟遅能神 (Yashimamujinokami) | Alternate Name= 八嶋牟遅能神 | Other Names = | Divine Rank = | Divine Role = God of the Land | Mausoleum = | Father = Unknown | Mother = | Relatives = | Consort = Unknown | Children = {{ill|Tottori-no-Kami|lt=Tottori-no-Kami|lt=Tottorijin|ja|鳥取神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tottorijin|qq=}} | Shrine = | Texts = {{ill|Kojiki|en|Kojiki|WD=Q813031|lt=Kojiki|1=Kojiki}} | gender= {{ill|male|WD=Q6581097|1=Male (gender)}} | offspring= {{ill|Totori no kami|WD=Q48760952|1=Tottori-no-Kami}} }}
'''Yashimamujinokami''' (八島牟遅能神, {{smaller|Modern kana orthography:}} ヤシマムジ) is a deity appearing in {{ill|Japanese mythology|en|Japanese mythology|WD=Q814158|lt=Japanese mythology|1=Japanese mythology}}.
== Overview == Yashimamujinokami is a deity mentioned exclusively in the ''{{ill|Kojiki|en|Kojiki|WD=Q813031|lt=Kojiki|1=Kojiki}}'' and is regarded as the parent of {{ill|Tottori-no-Kami|lt=Tottori-no-Kami|lt=Tottorijin|ja|鳥取神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tottorijin|qq=}}.
The name "Yashima" means "many islands," while "Muji" denotes "noble person." "No" is interpreted as a case particle, giving the name the meaning of "Noble person of many islands."{{Sfn|Nishinomiya|2014|p=381}}
== Genealogy == [[File:Ohokuninushi family tree.png|right|thumb|250px|Genealogy of Ōkuninushi (as per the ''Kojiki''). Blue represents male deities, red represents female deities, and yellow represents deities of unknown gender.]]
Yashimamujinokami's daughter is {{ill|Tottori-no-Kami|lt=Tottorijin|ja|鳥取神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tottorijin|qq=}}, who bore {{ill|Torinarumi no Kami|ja|鳥鳴海神|1=Torinarumi-no-Kami|1=Torinarumi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Torinarumi no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Torinarumi-no-Kami|qq=}} with {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}.
== See Also == * {{ill|Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|ja|十七世神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|qq=}} * {{ill|Yashimajinumi|en|Yashimajinumi|WD=Q55522907|lt=Yashimajinumi|1=Yashimajinumi}} - The first of the 17 generations.

*
== External Links == * [https://kojiki.kokugakuin.ac.jp/shinmei/yashimamujinokami/ Yashimamujinokami – Kokugakuin University Classical Culture Project]
{{Japanese mythology}} {{Shinto Horizontal}} == Overview of the Generations == {{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|建速須佐之男命|simple|User:Immanuelle/Takehaya Susanoo no Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}} married {{ill|Kushinadahime|ja|櫛名田比売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kushinadahime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kushinadahime|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to クシナダヒメ}} (daughter of [[Ashinazuchi and Tenazuchi]]) and had {{ill|Yashimajinumi|en|Yashimajinumi|WD=Q55522907|lt=Yashimajinumi|1=Yashimajinumi}}<ref name="auto">{{Cite web|title=Encyclopedia of Shinto - Home : Kami in Classic Texts : Yashimajinumi|url=http://eos.kokugakuin.ac.jp/modules/xwords/entry.php?entryID=181|website=eos.kokugakuin.ac.jp}}</ref>.
This god married {{ill|Konohanachiru-hime|en|Konohanachiru-hime|WD=Q48745675|lt=Konohanachiru-hime|1=Konohanachiru-hime}}<ref name="auto" /> (daughter of {{ill|Ōyamatsumi|ja|大山津見神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ōyamatsumi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōyamatsumi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to オオヤマツミ}}) and had {{ill|Fuwanomochikunusunu Kami|ja|布波能母遅久奴須奴神|1=Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|1=Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|simple|User:Immanuelle/Fuwanomochikunusunu Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuwanomochikunusunu Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|qq=}}.
This god married {{ill|Hikawahime|ja|日河比売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hikawahime|fr|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikawahime|qq=}} (daughter of {{ill|Kuraokami|en|Kuraokami|WD=Q644201|lt=Kuraokami|1=Kuraokami}}) and had {{ill|Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|ja|深淵之水夜礼花神|1=Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|simple|User:Immanuelle/Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|qq=}}.
This god married {{ill|Amanotsutobetsuneru Kami|ja|天之都度閇知泥神|1=Ame-no-Tsudoechine|simple|User:Immanuelle/Amanotsutobetsuneru Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amanotsutobetsuneru Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Tsudoechine|qq=}} and had {{ill|Omizunu|en|Omizunu|WD=Q48745416|lt=Omizunu|1=Omizunu}}.
This god married {{ill|Futemimi|ja|布帝耳神|1=Futemimi|fr|6=simple|7=User:Immanuelle/Futemimi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Futemimi|13=User:Immanuelle/Futemimi|qq=}} (daughter of {{ill|Funodomuno Kami|ja|布怒豆怒神|1=Funozuno|simple|User:Immanuelle/Funodomuno Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Funodomuno Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Funozuno|qq=}}) and had {{ill|Ame-no-Fuyukinu|en|Ame-no-Fuyukinu|WD=Q48744862|lt=Ame-no-Fuyukinu|1=Ame-no-Fuyukinu}}<ref>Philippi, Donald L. (2015). ''Kojiki''. Princeton University Press. p. 92.</ref><ref>Chamberlain (1882). [http://sacred-texts.com/shi/kj/kj027.htm Section XX.—The August Ancestors of the Deity-Master-Of-The-Great Land.]</ref>. (daughter of {{ill|Ōyamatsumi|ja|大山津見神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ōyamatsumi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōyamatsumi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to オオヤマツミ}}) and had {{ill|Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|ja|布波能母遅久奴須奴神|1=Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|1=Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|qq=}}<ref>{{cite book|url=https://books.google.com/books?id=Sg_JBQAAQBAJ&pg=PT402|title=Shinto: At the Fountainhead of Japan|last=Herbert|first=J.|publisher=Taylor & Francis|year=2010|isbn=978-1-136-90376-2|series=Routledge Library Editions: Japan|page=402|access-date=2020-11-21}}</ref>.
This god married {{ill|Hikawahime|ja|日河比売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hikawahime|fr|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikawahime|qq=}} (daughter of {{ill|Kuraokami|en|Kuraokami|WD=Q644201|lt=Kuraokami|1=Kuraokami}}) and had {{ill|Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|ja|深淵之水夜礼花神|1=Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|simple|User:Immanuelle/Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|qq=}}.
This god married {{ill|Ame-no-Tsudoechine|ja|天之都度閇知泥神|1=Ame-no-Tsudoechine|en|6=simple|7=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Tsudoechine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Tsudoechine|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Tsudoechine|qq=}} and had {{ill|Omizunu|en|Omizunu|WD=Q48745416|lt=Omizunu|1=Omizunu}}.
This god married {{ill|Futemimi|ja|布帝耳神|1=Futemimi|fr|6=simple|7=User:Immanuelle/Futemimi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Futemimi|13=User:Immanuelle/Futemimi|qq=}} (daughter of {{ill|Funozuno|ja|布怒豆怒神|1=Funozuno|simple|User:Immanuelle/Funozuno|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Funozuno|13=User:Immanuelle/Funozuno|qq=}}) and had {{ill|Ame-no-Fuyukinu|en|Ame-no-Fuyukinu|WD=Q48744862|lt=Ame-no-Fuyukinu|1=Ame-no-Fuyukinu}}<ref>Philippi, Donald L. (2015). ''Kojiki''. Princeton University Press. p. 92.</ref><ref>Chamberlain (1882). [http://sacred-texts.com/shi/kj/kj027.htm Section XX.—The August Ancestors of the Deity-Master-Of-The-Great Land.]</ref>. (This Amanofuyuorihime Kami is also known as Amanofukine Kami{{Sfn|Kondo Toshitaka|1993}}, and is said to be the child of Takehaya Susanoo no Mikoto {{ill|Hinomisaki Shrine|ja|日御崎神社社伝。|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinomisaki Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. The child {{ill|Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|ja|清武豊彦命|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135491392|1=Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto}} is the ancestor of the {{ill|Ono Family (Shake)|lt=Ono Family|ja|小野氏 (社家)|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ono Family (Shake)|lt=Ono Family|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Family (Shake)|qq=}} who were priests of {{ill|Hinomisaki Shrine|ja|日御崎神社社伝。|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinomisaki Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}{{Sfn|Kondo Toshitaka|1993}}.)
This god married {{ill|Sashikuni Wakahime|ja|刺国若比売|1=Sashikuni Wakahime|2=ja|3=刺国若比売|4=simple|5=User:Immanuelle/Sashikuni Wakahime|en:draft|simple|User:Immanuelle/Sashikuni Wakahime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sashikuni Wakahime|13=User:Immanuelle/Sashikuni Wakahime|qq=}} (daughter of {{ill|Sashikuni Ōkami|ja|刺国大神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Sashikuni Ōkami|fr|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sashikuni Ōkami|qq=}}) and had {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi no Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}} (Ōnamuchi no Kami. Half-sibling to the {{ill|Yasogami|ja|八十神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Yasogami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yasogami|qq=}}).
This god married {{ill|Tottori-no-Kami|ja|鳥取神|1=Tottori-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Tottori-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tottori-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Tottori-no-Kami|qq=}} (daughter of {{ill|Yashimamochinogami|ja|八島牟遅能神|1=Yashimamuji|simple|User:Immanuelle/Yashimamochinogami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yashimamochinogami|13=User:Immanuelle/Yashimamuji|qq=}}) and had {{ill|Torinarumi-no-Kami|ja|鳥鳴海神|1=Torinarumi-no-Kami|1=Torinarumi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Torinarumi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Torinarumi-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Torinarumi-no-Kami|qq=}}.
This god married {{ill|Hinateri-Nukada-Bichio-Ikochini-no-Kami|ja|日名照額田毘道男伊許知邇神|1=Hinateri-Nukada-Bichio-Ikochini-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hinateri-Nukada-Bichio-Ikochini-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinateri-Nukada-Bichio-Ikochini-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinateri-Nukada-Bichio-Ikochini-no-Kami|qq=}} and had {{ill|Kuninotoshimi-no-Kami|ja|国忍富神|1=Kuninotoshimi-no-Kami|1=Kuninotoshimi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kuninotoshimi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuninotoshimi-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuninotoshimi-no-Kami|qq=}}.
This god married {{ill|Ashinataka-no-Kami|ja|葦那陀迦神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ashinataka-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashinataka-no-Kami|qq=}} and had {{ill|Hayamike-no-Takekasayanosunumi-no-Kami|ja|速甕之多気佐波夜遅奴美神|1=Hayamike-no-Takekasayanosunumi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hayamike-no-Takekasayanosunumi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hayamike-no-Takekasayanosunumi-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Hayamike-no-Takekasayanosunumi-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
This god married {{ill|Sakitamahime|ja|前玉比売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Sakitamahime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakitamahime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of {{ill|Amanomikemunushi-no-Kami|ja|天之甕主神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Amanomikemunushi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amanomikemunushi-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) and had {{ill|Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja|甕主日子神|1=Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
This god married {{ill|Hinarashibime|ja|比那良志毘売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of {{ill|Kuraokami|en|Kuraokami|WD=Q644201|lt=Kuraokami|1=Kuraokami}}) and had {{ill|Tahirikishimarumi Kami|ja|多比理岐志麻流美神|1=Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|10=zh|11=多比理岐志麻流美神|1=Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Tahirikishimarumi Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tahirikishimarumi Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|qq=}}.
This god married {{ill|Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja|活玉前玉比売神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of {{ill|Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja|比比羅木之其花麻豆美神|1=Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) and had {{ill|Mironami-no-Kami|ja|美呂浪神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
This god married {{ill|Aonuma-Mashi-no-Maou-hime|ja|青沼馬沼押比売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Aonuma-Mashi-no-Maou-hime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aonuma-Mashi-no-Maou-hime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of {{ill|Shikiyamanushi-no-Kami|ja|敷山主神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Shikiyamanushi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikiyamanushi-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) and had {{ill|Nunototomi Torinarumi-no-Kami|ja|布忍富鳥鳴海神|1=Nunobutomi-Torinarumi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Nunototomi Torinarumi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nunototomi Torinarumi-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Nunobutomi-Torinarumi-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
This god married {{ill|Wakatsukime Kami|ja|若尽女神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Wakatsukime Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakatsukime Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and had {{ill|Amanohibarudaisakanodomi Kami|ja|天日腹大科度美神|1=Ame-no-Hibaraooshinadomi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Amanohibarudaisakanodomi Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amanohibarudaisakanodomi Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Hibaraooshinadomi-no-Kami|qq=}}.
This god married {{ill|Totsumatone-no-Kami|ja|遠津待根神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Totsumatone-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Totsumatone-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (daughter of {{ill|Amanosagiri-no-Kami|ja|天之狭霧神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Amanosagiri-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amanosagiri-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to オオヤマツミ}}) and had {{ill|Totsuyami-Sakitara-no-Kami|ja|遠津山岬多良斯神|1=Totsuyami-Sakitara-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Totsuyami-Sakitara-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Totsuyami-Sakitara-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Totsuyami-Sakitara-no-Kami|qq=}}.
